title: hieracium vulgatum f. pseudosubramosum
intro: Hieracium vulgatum f. pseudosubramosum, a lesser-known variety of hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Hieracium vulgatum f. pseudosubramosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and potentially even act as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or oil, and it can also be used as a topical cream or ointment to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
